topic: excessive storage heat and premature wine evolution

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Bottled wine is exposed to excessive temperature for a prolonged period.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Heat accelerates oxidation and other chemical reactions and can also increase expansion and pressure within the bottle.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine evolves prematurely, loses fresh fruit character, and may develop cooked or oxidised flavours.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine evolves prematurely, loses fresh fruit character, and may develop cooked or oxidised flavours.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
